name: The Knowledge Room
description:
This is the reception room of the clan, where most of &gDr&yag&con's&n set
meetings here to think about new plans.  This room is most decorated than all
of them.  There are Statues of knights, armors made of mithril and a large
variety of good weapons.  Here you can know about the &gDr&yag&con's
&gAll&yian&cce&n news just checking the &gDr&yag&con's &gAll&yian&cce&n Board.
